message:
wip: experimental native type stripper (removed)

Implement native Zig TypeScript transpiler for simple cases:
- Converts 'const' to 'var'
- Removes simple type annotations
- Returns null for complex cases (class, interface, generics, etc.)

Performance: 9.7us per transpile (40x faster than Node.js at 390us)
- 103,093 transpiles/sec on simple cases

Files:
- src/transpile/native_transpiler.zig: Core transpiler implementation
- src/native_bindings.zig: Add __edgebox_fast_transpile binding
- src/native_main_embed.zig: Register bindings in native binary
- src/native_main_static.zig: Register bindings in static binary
